issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is not a valid trigger type. Blocker is a keyword ability triggered by opponent's attack declaration, should use 'OnAttacked'
Action 'PlaySelf' is incorrect. Blocker allows resting the card to redirect attack target; should use 'Rest' action to represent the card being rested as cost

Blocker effect is a passive keyword ability that modifies game rules (redirects attack target), not represented by simple action list. DSL should reflect: OnAttacked trigger, optional Rest action, and effect description noting it becomes new attack target

suggestedDsl.description: After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.
